title: Senior Software Engineer - Jio Platforms - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Jio Platforms - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Jio Platforms family as a Senior Software Engineer in Indore. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Jio Platforms:
Jio Platforms is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jio Platforms!
